Usage: gs integration (int) tip clean (prune)

Remove tips whose upstack already contains another tip

Removes tips whose upstack chain already contains another configured tip. The
higher tip's merge into the integration branch captures the lower tip's content,
so keeping both costs an extra merge without changing the result.

For each subsumed tip, the message reports which higher tip subsumes it.
A second run is a no-op once nothing remains to prune. Existing tips with no
upstack-tip relationship are left alone.

Global Flags:
  -h, --help           Show help for the command
      --version        Print version information and quit
  -v, --verbose        Enable verbose output ($GIT_SPICE_VERBOSE)
  -C, --dir=DIR        Change to DIR before doing anything
      --[no-]prompt    Whether to prompt for missing information
